ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the article */,
  "heading" TEXT /* Title or heading of the article */,
  "subheading" TEXT /* Subheading of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID to classify the article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "publish_time" TEXT /* Time when the article was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL link to the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the article */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was created */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was last modified */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image associated with the article */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the article (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the news source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the news source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., journalist, editor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view record */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the article */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was viewed */,
  "view_time" TEXT /* Time when the article was viewed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to view the article (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used to view the article (e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Safari) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share record */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being shared */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the article was shared */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was shared */,
  "share_time" TEXT /* Time when the article was shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_shares_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edit_logs" (
  "edit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edit log */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article that was edited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the edit */,
  "edit_date" TEXT /* Date when the edit was made */,
  "edit_time" TEXT /* Time when the edit was made */,
  "edit_description" TEXT /* Description of the edit made */,
  "edit_type" TEXT /* Type of edit made (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edit_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Time when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related article */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new comment, article update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was made */,
  "rating_time" TEXT /* Time when the rating was made */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_ratings_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_bookmarks" (
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being bookmarked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the bookmark */,
  "bookmark_date" TEXT /* Date when the bookmark was made */,
  "bookmark_time" TEXT /* Time when the bookmark was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_bookmarks_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_bookmarks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
